asset_name: Star Wars General Grievous Low Poly Model
author: SciFi Asset Studio
usage_notes: Low-poly General Grievous hero unit model. Distinctive four-armed cyborg silhouette with cape. Tan/brown metallic color scheme. Suitable for hero/commander unit classification in Separatist force.
special_notes: Four-armed character - unique silhouette for hero identification
Cape geometry adds visual interest while remaining low-poly
Metallic gray/tan coloring matches droid appearance
No skeleton rig - may require rig addition for animation

steps: Click the Download button (requires free Sketchfab account)
Select GLB format (recommended for Unity import)
Save as source_download.glb in this directory
Run: dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- ingest assets raw/sw_general_grievous_sketchfab_001

asset_manifest.json.description: This file - metadata and provenance record

discovery_notes: Discovered via Sketchfab search: 'General Grievous low poly Star Wars'
Score: 9.5/10 - Excellent distinctive silhouette, hero-appropriate detail, CC-BY license
